title: Moist Nutty Russian English Muffin Sandwich
description: A nutty and indulgent Russian dish featuring English muffins, this recipe is a unique twist on traditional sandwiches, and is shojin-friendly, served in a bento-box.
instructions: Toast the English muffins until they are lightly browned.
Spread a layer of walnut butter on each toasted English muffin half.
Drizzle a small amount of honey over the walnut butter on each English muffin half.
Sprinkle a few raisins over the honey on each English muffin half.
Spread a layer of apple butter on top of the raisins on each English muffin half.
Sprinkle a few chopped walnuts over the apple butter on each English muffin half.
Top each English muffin half with a dollop of fermented cashew cream.
Season with a pinch of sea salt to taste.
Assemble the sandwiches by placing the other English muffin half on top of the filling.
Serve the sandwiches in a bento-box for a unique and indulgent treat.
